testcase.name: testCreateProject_ClientNotFound
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-19 22:46:23.796 INFO 16388 --- [ main] c.f.project.service.ProjectService : Attempting to create project: Title for client: 1 2026-05-19 22:46:23.796 WARN 16388 --- [ main] c.f.project.service.ProjectService : User lookup returned null for client ID: 1 2026-05-19 22:46:23.797 INFO 16388 --- [ main] c.f.project.service.ProjectService : Project saved successfully with ID: 1 2026-05-19 22:46:23.798 INFO 16388 --- [ main] c.f.project.service.ProjectService : Notification sent for project: 1

testcase.name: testActivateProject_Success
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-19 22:46:23.845 INFO 16388 --- [ main] c.f.project.service.ProjectService : Project 1 activated successfully.

testcase.name: testCreateProject_NotificationFailure

testcase.name: testDeleteProject
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-19 22:46:23.906 INFO 16388 --- [ main] c.f.project.service.ProjectService : Deleting project with ID: 1

testcase.name: testCreateProject_Success
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-19 22:46:23.925 INFO 16388 --- [ main] c.f.project.service.ProjectService : Attempting to create project: Title for client: 1 2026-05-19 22:46:23.926 INFO 16388 --- [ main] c.f.project.service.ProjectService : Client validated: Client Name 2026-05-19 22:46:23.926 INFO 16388 --- [ main] c.f.project.service.ProjectService : Project saved successfully with ID: 1 2026-05-19 22:46:23.928 INFO 16388 --- [ main] c.f.project.service.ProjectService : Notification sent for project: 1
